task_description: Search for a men's bomber jacket, review its images and variant, and proceed to purchase it immediately.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows In the zoomed-in crop, the semitransparent red X is centered on an empty white area below the large multicolored Google logo, not on any button, icon, text field, or handle. In the full-screen view, a Chrome new tab page is open with the Google homepage in Chinese; the central search box is active and expanded with a dropdown of search/history suggestions such as Amazon, Uber Eats, GitHub, Spotify, Google Calendar, Booking, and Google Map. The click target is a blank region on the page canvas outside the suggestion panel.
caption.action: Click the blank white page area beneath the Google logo.
caption.expectation: The suggestion dropdown should dismiss, leaving the page in a neutral state without opening a menu or selecting any object.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the centered Google search field with the text entry area active; the word "Amazon" is visible inside the search box with the text cursor at the end, indicating typing into the search field rather than selecting a suggestion. Below it, the autocomplete panel is open with suggestions including "amazon - Google 搜索," an Amazon result labeled in Chinese, and related searches such as "amazon 香港," "amazon 深圳," "amazon us," and "amazon prime." The full-screen image shows a Chrome new tab page on Google in Chinese, with the large multicolored Google logo above the search box and the rest of the page mostly blank.
caption.action: Type "AMAZON" into the Google search box, appending it in the active field.
caption.expectation: The search field should contain AMAZON and the autocomplete suggestions should update to match the typed query.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the Google homepage search area with a semitransparent red X over the middle of the active search box region beneath the large multicolored Google logo. The full-screen view shows Chrome on a Google new tab page in Chinese, with the search box containing the text "Amazon" and an autocomplete panel open below it. The top suggestion is an Amazon result with the Amazon icon and Chinese subtitle, followed by suggestions such as "Amazon - Google 搜索," "amazon 香港," "amazon 深圳," "amazon us," and "amazon prime."
caption.expectation: Google should submit the current query for Amazon and open the search results page or the highlighted top result.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a Google search result card for Amazon.com, with a semitransparent red X centered directly on the blue underlined result title text reading "Amazon.com Official Site | Shop Online Today with Amazon." Above it are the site name "Amazon.com" and the URL "https://www.amazon.com," and below it is snippet text about shopping and shipping. The full-screen view shows the Google results page in Chrome for the query "amazon," with this Amazon sponsored result on the left and an Amazon information panel on the right.
caption.action: Click the blue result title "Amazon.com Official Site | Shop Online Today with Amazon."
caption.expectation: Chrome should open the Amazon website from the selected Google result, likely loading Amazon.com in the current tab.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the long Amazon search field in the top navigation bar, with a semitransparent red X centered on the empty text-entry area to the right of the category dropdown labeled "All" and to the left of the magnifying-glass search button. This is a UI control in the top area. The full-screen view shows the Amazon homepage loaded in Chrome, including the dark header, a shipping notice popup about delivery to Hong Kong near the upper left, a Google Translate language popup near the upper right, and product tiles below on a purple promotional banner.
caption.action: Click inside the Amazon search box.
caption.expectation: The search field should become active and ready for text entry, with the cursor appearing in the box.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in view shows Amazon's top search bar with the category dropdown set to "All" and the text entry field containing the word "jacket," indicating text is being entered into the search field rather than selecting a suggestion. A white autocomplete panel is open underneath with suggestions including "jackets for women," "jackets," "jackets for women trendy," "jackets for women casual," "jacket hanger," "jacket rack," "jackets for boys," "jacket for dress," and "jackets for women from Top Brands." The full-screen view shows the Amazon homepage in Chrome, with the dark header, a delivery popup about shipping to Hong Kong overlapping the upper-left area, a yellow search button with a magnifying-glass icon at the right end of the search bar, and product tiles and promotional content dimmed behind the autocomplete list.
caption.action: Type "JACKETS" into the Amazon search field, replacing the current partial text "jacket" with the intended plural query.
caption.expectation: The search box should display the updated query "jackets," and the autocomplete suggestions should refresh to jacket-related search suggestions.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the top portion of the Amazon page with the search area active; a semitransparent red X appears over the page, but the raw action indicates a keyboard submission. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open on Amazon.com, the search box in the dark header contains the completed query "jackets," and an autocomplete dropdown is visible with suggestions such as "jackets for women," "jackets," and other jacket-related searches. A shipping popup about delivery to Hong Kong overlaps the upper-left portion of the page, while product tiles are visible in the dimmed background.
caption.action: Press ENTER to submit the search for "jackets."
caption.expectation: The autocomplete list should disappear and Amazon should load the search results page for jackets.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a product image tile featuring a black zip-front bomber jacket, with a small orange "Best Seller" label above it. A semitransparent red X is centered on the left sleeve area of that jacket image, indicating the click target is the product tile itself rather than a toolbar control. In the full-screen Amazon search results page for "jackets," this black jacket appears in the third product column under the results grid, with the listing text below reading "TACVASEN Men's Bomber Jacket Lightweight Casual Spring Fall Windbreaker Zip Up Coat with Pocket." A shipping popup about delivery to Hong Kong is open near the upper left, and other jacket listings are visible around it.
caption.action: Click the black bomber jacket product tile for the TACVASEN men's bomber jacket.
caption.expectation: The selected product should open, typically loading its product details page in the current tab.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full Amazon product page without any red X, consistent with a scroll action affecting the page itself. The screen is on a TACVASEN men's bomber jacket listing: a large black zip-front jacket photo appears on the left with several small thumbnail images beside it, the product title and rating are centered, color swatches and size buttons are visible below, and the purchase panel with price, quantity, Add to cart, and Buy Now is on the right. A delivery popup for shipping to Hong Kong is still open near the upper left, overlapping the page header.
caption.action: Scroll up on the Amazon product page to move higher on the listing.
caption.expectation: The page should shift upward, revealing content nearer the top of the product listing while keeping the same product open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a small square color/image swatch in the left-side vertical thumbnail strip, outlined in blue, with a semitransparent red X centered on it. The swatch appears to be a light gray jacket variant image, indicating the click target is a product option object rather than a toolbar control. In the full Amazon product page, the main product image is on the left, the title and price are in the center, and a grid of color swatches is visible below the title; the shipping popup to Hong Kong remains open near the top left. The clicked item corresponds to selecting a different jacket image/variant, which should update the product preview and selected option.
caption.action: Click the light gray jacket thumbnail swatch in the left image strip.
caption.expectation: That thumbnail should become selected, and the main product image and possibly the chosen color variant should update to match it.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the main product media area with a lifestyle image of a man wearing a maroon bomber jacket over a white shirt and jeans, with large bold text across the image reading "BOMBER JACK..." and a circular play-style overlay in the center. A semitransparent red X is centered on this main image/video area, indicating the click target is the media object on the page, not a toolbar control. In the full Amazon product page, the left column contains a vertical strip of jacket thumbnails, the center shows the TACVASEN men's bomber jacket title, rating, price, and multiple color swatches, and the right side has quantity, Add to cart, and Buy Now. A shipping popup for Hong Kong remains open near the top left.
caption.action: Click the main product media image showing the model in the maroon bomber jacket.
caption.expectation: The product media should become active, likely opening the image/video viewer or starting playback of the product video in the media area.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full Amazon product page with no red X, indicating a scroll action on the page rather than a specific control. Visible on screen are the left-side vertical image thumbnails, a large blank white product media area, the product title "TACVASEN Men's Bomber Jacket Lightweight Casual Spring Fall windbreaker Zip Up Coat with Pocket," price, rating, many color swatches, size buttons near the lower middle, and the purchase panel on the right with quantity, Add to cart, and Buy Now. A shipping popup saying items ship to Hong Kong remains open near the upper left. The full-screen view confirms the browser is on the same Amazon jacket listing and the page itself is the scrollable region.
caption.action: Scroll down on the Amazon product page.
caption.expectation: The page should move lower, bringing more content farther down the product listing into view while staying on the same item page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the right-side purchase panel of the Amazon page. A semitransparent red X is centered directly on the orange rounded rectangle labeled "Buy Now," below the yellow "Add to cart" button and beneath the quantity dropdown. This is a UI control button. The full-screen view confirms the page is an Amazon product listing for a TACVASEN men's bomber jacket, with product images and video on the left, title and color swatches in the center, and the purchase box on the right; a shipping popup for Hong Kong is still visible near the upper left.
caption.action: Click the orange "Buy Now" button in the right purchase panel.
caption.expectation: Amazon should start the immediate purchase flow, typically taking the page to sign-in, checkout, or a purchase confirmation step.
